creator: robin.haberkorn@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #12)

I provided an updated patch.
And I will become its maintainer? That's at least what the Makefile says now.
What am I supposed to do when there is a new upstream version, that I would like to get into the ports tree? File a new bug report and assign it to you?
Most of the time, these will be simple updates of the DISTVERSION variable and the distinfo file.
